items.claim: Levi Rodriguez has one-hitter quitter power.
items.quote: what I have seen is ridiculous one-hitter quitter power.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez is coming off a steroid suspension.
items.quote: he's coming off I think a steroid suspension.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez lacks a wrestling background.
items.quote: Levi Rodriguez does not have a wrestling background.

items.claim: Alden Coria has a personal relationship with matchmaker Mick Maynard.
items.quote: He has some kind of relationship with Mick Maynard. That much I'm very confident on.

items.claim: Alden Coria has high-level boxing for MMA.
items.quote: His boxing for MMA is disgusting.

items.claim: Alden Coria's takedown defense has improved significantly.
items.quote: His takedown defense has come a long way.

items.claim: Stewart Nicoll does not belong at the UFC level.
items.quote: simply put, Stuart Little just doesn't belong in the UFC.

items.claim: Anna Milisana lacks the skill level to compete at the highest level of the UFC.
items.quote: I'm just not confident that they belong at the at the highest level.

items.claim: Deoni Barbosa is on the cusp of the top 15 rankings.
items.quote: I still think she's on the cusp of the top 15.

items.claim: Deoni Barbosa makes poor tactical decisions during fights.
items.quote: Barbosa made enough bonehead mistakes in her last fight against Gatto

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is on the cusp of the top 10 rankings.
items.quote: Kid, you're on the cusp of the top 10.
